ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Offers classes and functions to contact web servers while enforcing scheduling rules required by the sites. The URL class makes it easy to construct a URL by providing parameters as a vector. The Request class allows to describes SOAP (Simple Object Access Protocol) or standard requests: URL, method (POST or GET), header, body. The Scheduler class controls the request frequency for each server address by mean of rules (Rule class). The RequestResult class permits to get the request status to handle error cases and the content.

Offers classes and functions to contact web servers while enforcing scheduling rules required by the sites. The URL class makes it easy to construct a URL by providing parameters as a vector. The Request class allows to describes SOAP (Simple Object Access Protocol) or standard requests: URL, method (POST or GET), header, body. The Scheduler class controls the request frequency for each server address by mean of rules (Rule class). The RequestResult class permits to get the request status to handle error cases and the content.

name: r-sched
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.0.3' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-sched
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/sched_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/sched/sched_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 237723fa266ac71b2fc6c6e8163e3be3a3fad1a21238486ff4c68fc6ca43d9d8

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-r6
    - r-rcurl
    - r-chk
    - r-fscache >=1.0.3
    - r-lgr
    - r-openssl
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-r6
    - r-rcurl
    - r-chk
    - r-fscache >=1.0.3
    - r-lgr
    - r-openssl

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('sched')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('sched')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://gitlab.com/cnrgh/databases/r-sched
  license: AGPL-3.0-or-later
  summary: 'Offers classes and functions to contact web servers while enforcing scheduling rules
    required by the sites. The URL class makes it easy to construct a URL by providing
    parameters as a vector. The Request class allows to describes SOAP (Simple Object
    Access Protocol) or standard requests: URL, method (POST or GET), header, body.
    The Scheduler class controls the request frequency for each server address by mean
    of rules (Rule class). The RequestResult class permits to get the request status
    to handle error cases and the content.'
  license_family: AGPL
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/AGPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: sched
# Title: Request Scheduler
# Version: 1.0.3
# Authors@R: c(person("Pierrick", "Roger", email="pierrick.roger@cea.fr", role=c("aut", "cre"), comment=c(ORCID="0000-0001-8177-4873")))
# Maintainer: Pierrick Roger <pierrick.roger@cea.fr>
# Description: Offers classes and functions to contact web servers while enforcing scheduling rules required by the sites. The URL class makes it easy to construct a URL by providing parameters as a vector. The Request class allows to describes SOAP (Simple Object Access Protocol) or standard requests: URL, method (POST or GET), header, body. The Scheduler class controls the request frequency for each server address by mean of rules (Rule class). The RequestResult class permits to get the request status to handle error cases and the content.
# URL: https://gitlab.com/cnrgh/databases/r-sched
# BugReports: https://gitlab.com/cnrgh/databases/r-sched/-/issues
# Depends: R (>= 4.1)

# NeedsCompilation: no
